# Article Review Checklist

Thank you for reviewing this article submission! Please use this checklist to guide your review.

---

## Review Dimensions

### Outstanding Communication

Rate each dimension on a scale of 1-5 (higher is better):

#### Article Structure (1-5): ___
- [ ] Clear introduction and motivation
- [ ] Logical flow between sections
- [ ] Appropriate section organization
- [ ] Effective use of headings and hierarchy
- [ ] Strong conclusion/summary

**Comments:**


#### Writing Style (1-5): ___
- [ ] Clear and accessible language
- [ ] Appropriate technical depth for audience
- [ ] Well-explained concepts
- [ ] Minimal jargon (or well-defined when necessary)
- [ ] Engaging and readable

**Comments:**


#### Diagram & Interface Style (1-5): ___
- [ ] High-quality visuals
- [ ] Consistent design language
- [ ] Appropriate color choices (accessibility considered)
- [ ] Clear labels and annotations
- [ ] Professional appearance

**Comments:**


#### Impact of Visualizations (1-5): ___
- [ ] Diagrams enhance understanding
- [ ] Interactive elements add value (if applicable)
- [ ] Visual examples clarify concepts
- [ ] Appropriate use of code examples
- [ ] Figures support the narrative

**Comments:**


#### Readability (1-5): ___
- [ ] Appropriate for target audience
- [ ] Monotonic increase in complexity
- [ ] No sudden difficulty jumps
- [ ] Key concepts are highlighted
- [ ] Good balance of text, visuals, and examples

**Comments:**


---

### Scientific Correctness & Integrity

#### Well-Supported Claims (1-5): ___
- [ ] Claims are backed by evidence
- [ ] Appropriate citations provided
- [ ] No unsupported assertions
- [ ] Results are reproducible
- [ ] Methodology is clear

**Comments:**


#### Limitations (1-5): ___
- [ ] Limitations honestly evaluated
- [ ] Trade-offs clearly explained
- [ ] Scope appropriately bounded
- [ ] Edge cases addressed
- [ ] Caveats clearly stated

**Comments:**


#### Reproducibility (1-5): ___
- [ ] Clear methodology
- [ ] Code examples are complete
- [ ] Steps can be replicated
- [ ] Dependencies listed
- [ ] Results are falsifiable

**Comments:**


#### Citations (1-5): ___
- [ ] Relevant prior work cited
- [ ] Recent developments included
- [ ] Original sources credited
- [ ] Bibliography is complete
- [ ] Links are working

**Comments:**


#### Intellectual Honesty (1-5): ___
- [ ] Balanced perspective
- [ ] Rigorous approach
- [ ] Alternative viewpoints considered
- [ ] Conflicts of interest disclosed (if any)
- [ ] Ethical considerations addressed (if applicable)

**Comments:**


---

## Specific Feedback

Please provide line-by-line or section-specific feedback below:

### Section: [Section Name]
**Issue:** [Description]
**Suggestion:** [How to improve]

### Line X: [Quote from article]
**Issue:** [Description]
**Suggestion:** [How to improve]

---

## General Comments

[Your overall assessment of the article - strengths, weaknesses, main concerns, suggestions for improvement]

---

## Recommendation

Please select one:

- [ ] **Accept as-is** - Ready to publish without changes
- [ ] **Accept with minor revisions** - Small fixes needed (typos, formatting, minor clarifications)
- [ ] **Major revisions needed** - Significant changes required before acceptance
- [ ] **Reject** - Does not meet standards or fit the publication

---

## Additional Notes

[Any other feedback, questions, or discussion points for the author]

---

## Review Metadata

**Reviewer:** [Your name]
**Date:** [Review date]
**Anonymity:** [ ] Anonymous [ ] Non-anonymous (publicly credited)
**Review time:** [Optional - how long did the review take?]
